messages.content: You are an expert Python programmer. You are given a function signature and a docstring. You need to complete the function body and also specify your confidence of your completion.

def find_max(words):
    """Given a list of different words, determine the word that has the maximum number of unique characters. When several words have the same maximum, choose the one that is lexicographically first.

    find_max(["name", "of", "string"]) == "string"
    find_max(["name", "enam", "game"]) == "enam"
    find_max(["aaaaaaa", "bb" ,"cc"]) == ""aaaaaaa"
    """
    if not words:
        return ""

    best_word = words[0]
    max_unique = len(set(best_word))

    for word in words[1:]:
        unique = len(set(word))
        if unique > max_unique or (unique == max_unique and word < best_word):
            max_unique = unique
            best_word = word

    return best_word


Complete the function body above and specify your confidence in your completion.
